llm_eval.notes: C08 implementation readiness gate。py_compile OK、test_coverage/test_runtimeがcomplete/incomplete/policy-error/symlink escape/architecture fallbackをexercise。frontmatter完備(read-only)。設計良: 自身は仕様再構築せずindex.md/requirements/architecture graph.json(nodes非空+string id)/completeness/source pluginをprobeするだけの薄いgate、completeness判定はproducer所有aggregate-completeness.pyへsubprocess委譲しGoodhart回避、source_plugin pinでname/version/entry-point一致を強制、build_report()が現在byteから再導出しC11のstale/forged readiness昇格を阻止(source_digestはcomplete時のみ)。evaluate_readiness()は不足理由をsorted logical-name:reasonで安定化。減点smell: resolve_context内で`import os`をローカル再import、main()で既にc09 load済なのにbuild_report()が_load_c09()を再実行(module二重load)、heading_countがfenced code内の#行も計上(>=1判定用途なので実害軽微)。重大欠陥なし
